languages.text:
Using common drugs no longer inflicts negative effects
Any drug used on yourself also heals for {uip|Heal|1089f86289fc408ea82057a3e02273bd} wounds

Any drug used on yourself also heals for {uip|Heal|1089f86289fc408ea82057a3e02273bd} wounds

languages.text:
Using combat stimulants does not inflict {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}negative effects{/g}.
If the user chooses themselves as a target of a combat stimulant, they regain +{uip|Heal|1089f86289fc408ea82057a3e02273bd} {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
Using combat stimulators does not inflict negative effects.
If the user chooses themselves as a target of a combat stimulator, they regain +{uip|Heal|1089f86289fc408ea82057a3e02273bd} wounds.

languages.text:
Использование боевых стимуляторов не накладывает {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}негативные эффекты{/g}.
Если обладатель аугмента выбирает себя целью боевого стимулятора, он восстанавливает +{uip|Heal|1089f86289fc408ea82057a3e02273bd} {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}здоровья{/g}.

languages.text:
Usar estimulantes de combate no provoca {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}efectos negativos{/g}.
Si el usuario se elige a sí mismo como objetivo de un estimulante de combate, recupera +{uip|Heal|1089f86289fc408ea82057a3e02273bd} {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}heridas{/g}.
languages.original_text:

languages.text:
Der Einsatz von Kampfstimulanzien bewirkt keine {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}negativen Effekte{/g}.
Wählt sich der Nutzer selbst als Ziel für ein Kampfstimulans aus, regeneriert er +{uip|Heal|1089f86289fc408ea82057a3e02273bd} {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}Wunden{/g}.
languages.original_text:
Using combat stimulants does not inflict {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}negative effects{/g}.
If the user chooses themselves as a target of a combat stimulant, they regain +{uip|Heal|1089f86289fc408ea82057a3e02273bd} {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g}.

languages.text:
Çatışma uyarıcıları kullanmak {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}olumsuz etkileri{/g} tetiklemez.
Kullanıcı, çatışma uyarıcısının hedefi olarak kendisini seçerse +{uip|Heal|1089f86289fc408ea82057a3e02273bd} {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}sağlık{/g} puanını geri kazanır.
languages.original_text:
Using combat stimulants does not inflict {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}negative effects{/g}.
If the user chooses themselves as a target of a combat stimulant, they regain +{uip|Heal|1089f86289fc408ea82057a3e02273bd} {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
Çatışma uyarıcıları kullanmak {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}olumsuz etkileri{/g} tetiklemez.
Kullanıcı, çatışma uyarıcısının hedefi olarak kendisini seçerse +{uip|Heal|1089f86289fc408ea82057a3e02273bd} {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}sağlık{/g} puanını geri kazanır.

languages.text:
L'utilisation de stimulants de combat n'applique pas d'{g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}effets négatifs{/g}.
Si l'utilisateur se choisit lui-même comme cible d'un stimulant de combat, il récupère +{uip|Heal|1089f86289fc408ea82057a3e02273bd} {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}blessures{/g}.
languages.original_text:
Using combat stimulants does not inflict {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}negative effects{/g}.
If the user chooses themselves as a target of a combat stimulant, they regain +{uip|Heal|1089f86289fc408ea82057a3e02273bd} {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g}.

traits.locale_text:

Si l'utilisateur se choisit lui-même comme cible d'un stimulant de combat, il récupère +{uip|Heal|1089f86289fc408ea82057a3e02273bd} {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}blessures{/g}.

languages.text:
使用战斗兴奋剂不会产生{g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}负面效果{/g}。
如果使用者对自己使用战斗兴奋剂，则恢复{uip|Heal|1089f86289fc408ea82057a3e02273bd}点{g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}生命值{/g}。
languages.original_text:
Using combat stimulants does not inflict {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}negative effects{/g}.
If the user chooses themselves as a target of a combat stimulant, they regain +{uip|Heal|1089f86289fc408ea82057a3e02273bd} {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
使用战斗兴奋剂不会产生{g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}负面效果{/g}。
如果使用者对自己使用战斗兴奋剂，则恢复{uip|Heal|1089f86289fc408ea82057a3e02273bd}点{g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}生命值{/g}。

languages.text:
戦闘刺激剤を使用しても{g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}マイナス効果は生じない{/g} 。
使用者が戦闘促進剤の対象として自分自身を選択した場合、+{uip|Heal|1089f86289fc408ea82057a3e02273bd} {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}傷{/g} を回復する。
